_session_note: Sim rig built and tested. resource_factor surplus problem found and root-caused. Boom-bust cycle is the target, not equilibrium.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.status: active — resource_factor formula needs redesign, carnivore balance pending, cards will be replaced
overview.sim_rig: Separate sim_test project with sim.toml config. cargo run -- sim.toml. biome.rs + types.rs shared with main project.
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: Card definitions and deck builders. Will be replaced entirely.
module_roles.biome.rs: World state, fitness resolution, biome contests, world effects. Zero I/O.
module_roles.player.rs: Three decks, two hands (combined limit 5, env limit 3). Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss.

turn_structure.declare: Human and AI declare simultaneously. Cards removed from hand immediately.
turn_structure.react: All intentions visible. One round to retarget, withdraw, add buffer.
turn_structure.commit: Execute intentions, world resolve, world event, next turn.

system_constants.PRESSURE_K1: NOT FINALIZED — depends on resource_factor fix
system_constants.PRESSURE_K2: NOT FINALIZED — depends on resource_factor fix

resource_factor_formula.current_surplus: log2(supply/need + 1) — PROBLEM: ratio=2 gives 1.585, too high
resource_factor_formula.problem_root_cause: Water surplus (water=8, need=4 → factor=1.585) compensates food shortage. p=1 h=2: food_factor=0.526 but water_factor=1.585 → h_fit=0.83. Herbivore stable when it should collapse.
resource_factor_formula.key_rule: h > p must NEVER be stable — herbivore must struggle when outnumbering producers
resource_factor_formula.two_levels_design: genugend (need met = 1.0), reichlich (surplus = up to 1.3 asymptote)
resource_factor_formula.applies_to: all resources uniformly — no mechanical reason to treat minerals differently
resource_factor_formula.verification_needed: after fix, water=8 need=4 should give 1.15 not 1.585

boom_bust_design.goal: Without carnivore: herbivore grows, overeats producers, system collapses (either producer or herbivore first). Carnivore prevents this cycle.

sim_rig_findings.K_0.1: p=1 h=2 stable at fit=0.83 — no collapse, water surplus masks food shortage
sim_rig_findings.K_0.3: p=6 start: boom-bust turns 1-7 (p:6→1, h:1→3→2), then dead p=1 h=2 equilibrium — no second cycle
sim_rig_findings.root_cause: resource_factor surplus bonus — fix formula first, then retune K

boom_bust_design.sunlight_bug_fixed: sim rig had resource_factor(supply, sn * pop) for sunlight — corrected to tolerance_factor(supply, sn, 999.0)

resource_rules.sunlight: Tolerance (tf), NOT resource_factor. NOT scaled by population. Reduced by shading.
resource_rules.minerals: Competitive, reach-based, scales with pop. rf(share, mineral_need * pop).
resource_rules.water: Competitive among animals ONLY. Producers do NOT use water.
resource_rules.food: Shared pool = sum(producer_pop * fitness * food_multiplier). No base_food_value.
resource_rules.predation: Hunt limit = size * hunt_multiplier (strictly <). No intraspecies predation (card.id). Carnivore-as-prey = 0.5x.

sunlight_shading.mechanism: Sort producers by size desc. Each group reduces available_light: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K.
sunlight_shading.shade_specialist: Low sun_need survives under large producers — valid niche.

producer_pressure.K_status: NOT FINALIZED — retune after resource_factor fix

reference_land.water_note: 8.0 chosen before resource_factor fix — may need adjustment after

omnivore.food: best split between producer pool and herbivore biomass

carnivore.design_note: pop should visually match herbivore but represent less biomass (CARNIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR=0.5)

open_issues: CRITICAL: boom-bust cycle not achieved — h > p must be unstable
predation_factor BUG: averages prey pool per carnivore instead of total_carn_need / total_prey_value
PRESSURE_K1/K2 NOT FINALIZED — retune after resource_factor fix
All cards will be replaced — alien/fantasy theme
WASM: pkg/ folder must be alongside index.html, python server required
next_session_tasks: 2. Re-run boom-bust sim, tune PRESSURE_K for collapse without immediate extinction
3. Fix predation_factor: remove averaging, use total_carn_need / total_prey_value

biome_system.land_slots: each land starts with standard biome (stack 0)

card_design_principles.theme: Alien/fantasy planet. 'The Future is Wild' aesthetic — biologically consistent foreign creatures.
card_design_principles.biome_tag_policy: only for genuine biological impossibility — traits and needs self-regulate
